exploration_notes:
Found all key files for Ingress API handling across v1beta1 and v1 in kubernetes/kubernetes:

**Conversion functions:**
- `pkg/apis/networking/v1beta1/conversion.go` — Manual conversion between networking.k8s.io/v1beta1 and internal types (IngressBackend, IngressSpec with ServiceName/ServicePort ↔ Service.Name/Service.Port mapping)
- `pkg/apis/networking/v1beta1/zz_generated.conversion.go` — Auto-generated conversion for networking v1beta1
- `pkg/apis/networking/v1/zz_generated.conversion.go` —
